items.title: Senior BoJ official: Delay in adjustment amid high inflation risk could trigger economic downturn
items.summary: Senior officials from the Bank of Japan (BoJ) said on Thursday that a delay in stimulus adjustment amid high inflation risk could trigger an economic downturn.

items.title: Swiss Franc holds losses as US Dollar recovers on Middle East tensions
